{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":822},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7489402994835866393","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"🤧我一开始还以为解决主世界的丧尸问题，后面还能没有生命威胁去帮其它世界，补上徐川那个也行。没想到直接统子脱离了……赵天也面目全非……我看见又提示虽然任务有救人得积分的，但是有些人只能去掠夺，就大事不妙了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743768516,"group_id":"7377010324488064025","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"838256177457603"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7377010324488064025","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"298"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":50015,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":17},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7489409999757067033","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，很喜欢女主的性格，很干脆，也不拖泥带水。😭没有番外吗？没有番外吗？玩家们都挺好的，没想到徐川和赵天是这样的结局，有种突然被强行中断的怅然所失。一直以为黑衣人是徐川……没想到是异形里面失踪的赵天。唉:-("},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743768234,"group_id":"7377010324488064025","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxN+1llCkK/+oY0TDNXC70g=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e82cebf8d1ff474eb239102b74a13491~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702230&x-signature=k8cE4XwhxXHoZKNpAl2EUi%2BVVOA%3D","user_id":"838256177457603","user_name":"镜湖的赵和"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"838256177457603","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7377010324488064025","book_info":{"abstract":"【天灾＋囤货＋无限空间＋异能＋女强＋无限流】
  苏棉意外绑定求生游戏，只要攒够积分，就能回到现实世界。
为了早日完成任务，她义无反顾投身一个又一个危险世界。
 很快她发现游戏玩家不止她一个，似乎只有她不太一样……
第一个世界：海上求生（完成）
第二个世界：极寒世界（完成）
第三个世界：异形世界（完成）
第四个世界：变异世界（完成）
第五个世界：极热世界  (完成)
第六个世界：进行中

,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":18226},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1726421377,"author_reply_time":1722327537,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7453860514231452441","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"女主强大到无敌，副本世界当中救人也救己，一切都是最好的闭环，最后回到最初，救回了自己相救的家人，自己的“女儿”也能和她一起生活，弥补了大多数遗憾，算是很完美的结局了。徐娇娇的哥哥以及阳光开朗的赵天经历了许多之后也变成了和开始完全不一样的样子，也是令人唏嘘，作者笔下的很多角色都有血有肉，虽然经历着不好的事情，但是也在自己能力范围内努力的做一个“救世主”，没有抛弃人的良知，好看，意满离[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735495553,"group_id":"7377010324488064025","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"嗨嗨嗨","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxOMJeATdlJkSqgEASxvfKo=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fd56ccc7c269455592ce9b169864cd54~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709251&x-signature=oEAMnn8GHToLfY9559qXg9bHBr4%3D","user_id":"967984084689165","user_name":"炎炎沐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"967984084689165","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1695229619,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7377010324488064025","book_info":{"abstract":"【天灾＋囤货＋无限空间＋异能＋女强＋无限流】

PS:每个副本女主身份都不一样，可能触及部分雷点，不喜欢可以直接跳下个副本看，基本不影响整体观看感","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o86bc265ea8e0312f35ea23b5157204c0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"江窈儿","author_id":"","book_id":"7377010324488064025","book_name":"生存游戏，我的金手指是无限空间","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#481810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9107人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7385578946839970329","read_count":"9107","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"613425"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"296","tags":"科幻末世,穿越,空间,末世,女强,囤物资","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/09a08d7205ad38576df0f7a047023df5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362344&x-signature=nHz7CFAHiV3K1FV%2FsRi6PCR3Tbs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"646101081786142","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"305"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":47662,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5374},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7448103127630218009","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以一看，总体来讲没啥大毛病，故事线很完整。
讲点个人认为的小缺点。最主要的老毛病了，这种文好容易就是开头女主是新人但是大杀四方，一堆作为老人的玩家却优柔寡断，手段也不够。这篇小说尤其严重，从头到尾那些配角都太弱了，非常扁平，除了苏梦和第一个世界那个哥哥，别人根本没啥记忆点。看起来作者好像是想写群像，尤其是女主原本的世界，但是真的没写出来，从头到尾其他玩家都是弱鸡，对比女主的能力，翻译和IT精英这种能力太弱了。一边写女主瞻前顾后好像很困难的样子但是一边又基本是一力降十会，全文真的很多这种上不去下不来的矛盾情节。
异形世界不是我的胃口没读，个人比较喜欢极热世界，关于奶奶的情节一直让我有种真实的淡淡的忧伤，很感染我。
还有就是这篇女主在杀伐果断的同时也会一定能力内帮助其他人，这在末世小说里面比较少见，很多都是独狼类型，分寸掌握也比较好吧。
所以综上可以给四分，有缺点但也有我比较喜欢的优点。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734153426,"group_id":"7377010324488064025","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3dD5NOOfmofekxN2nfW+Ws=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9e086601539742c197b2610b00c4223d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702043&x-signature=35wYaRwA%2FlMjp1nUSNGhLNX%2FOv8%3D","user_id":"880035435913975","user_name":"爱吃川椒枣酒的柳宁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"880035435913975","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7377010324488064025","book_info":{"abstract":"【天灾＋囤货＋无限空间＋异能＋女强＋无限流】

5217,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":4002},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7456639629606060824","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"女主很强大，冷静且善良，但是又完全不容坏人，对坏人没有一点点心慈手软，对没有恶意的普通人都秉持着在力所能及的范围内提供帮助。女主用穿越副本救世的功德换了一个回到自己本来的世界救了自己的世界。
一个因果循环，女主在副本世界生的孩子，最后研究出了女主世界的丧尸疫苗救了女主的世界。
几乎大部分坑作者都圆了，除了第一个世界里女主身体原主的哥哥，还有就是赵天。
虽然最后看得有点意犹未尽，但是我觉得很好看。女主做事理智，杀人利落，不受任何道德权力裹挟，可以说特别爽了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736138459,"group_id":"7377010324488064025","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一生都治愈不了的童年","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4HcBMuuVEd7p9ETBG5+dToeBfIammNBtWixnNhUbub3","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8f5075a97c0849d9b2013137aa8b6a46~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708149&x-signature=i5qoAqclluD6N3m20LofzdJoeew%3D","user_id":"2867997501817823","user_name":"了依狸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2867997501817823","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770964501,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7377010324488064025","book_info":{"abstract":"【天灾＋囤货＋无限空间＋异能＋女强＋无限流】

867,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1985},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7451594281470542654","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错了，目前为止少有我一章都不跳就能看完的书，主角的情感变化过程很是流畅，不会跳脱卡文，而且感觉文章是大女主爽文，武力值很猛的那种。文章悬念设计很有趣，最开始我还猜是植物人唤醒，文词幽默风趣，就是小黑猫确实用处不大，我个人怪喜欢猫猫来着，还以为女主能有个强有力的宠物辅助，最后发现，女主的人缘才是最重要的辅助。整体来说不枉我熬夜也要看完啊，另外大大加油，祝后续写文更上一层楼～"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734965809,"group_id":"7377010324488064025","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"游不动的时候就躺着随流飘","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzDLODgyuQS8LdxATEBxzOiBC0U9VE9rQ0BcAXnIPBvd","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1812453802116659","user_name":"妤云舒🐟🐟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1812453802116659","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7377010324488064025","book_info":{"abstract":"【天灾＋囤货＋无限空间＋异能＋女强＋无限流】
